usage_rules.primary_action: Use WiseDrive Blue (#2E3192) for primary buttons and active tab states.
usage_rules.secondary_action: Use WiseDrive Purple (#6366F1) for secondary actions or decorative icons.
usage_rules.highlight: Use WiseDrive Yellow (#FFD700) sparingly for notifications, badges, or 'New' indicators.
usage_rules.text: Never use pure black. Use Slate-900 (#0F172A) for headings and Slate-600 (#475569) for body.

layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto bg-slate-50 min-h-screen shadow-2xl overflow-hidden relative

navigation.style: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-t border-slate-200 h-16 pb-safe

layout.grid_system: Bento Grid for Dashboard (mix of col-span-1 and col-span-2)

cards.style: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200
cards.header: flex items-center justify-between mb-4 border-b border-slate-50 pb-3

buttons.primary: bg-[#2E3192] text-white hover:bg-[#1E2060] rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-semibold shadow-lg shadow-blue-900/20 active:scale-95 transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#2E3192] border border-[#2E3192]/20 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium active:scale-95 transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors

inputs.style: bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-slate-900 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2E3192]/20 focus:border-[#2E3192] transition-all outline-none placeholder:text-slate-400

badges.style: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 for sticky headers and modals.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Use soft, diffuse shadows (shadow-lg shadow-slate-200/50) to create depth without dirtiness.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Avoid heavy gradients. Use subtle mesh gradients in the Login background only.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use Lucide-React icons. Stroke width 1.5px for a refined look.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. REFINE THE HEADER: The existing .wisedrive-header is too basic. Replace it with a modern, sticky header with a glass effect.
2. MOBILE OPTIMIZATION: Ensure all touch targets are at least 44px. Use the 'Bottom Navigation' pattern for the main menu (Home, Leaves, Payslips, Profile).
3. DASHBOARD: Create a 'Bento Grid' layout for the dashboard. Don't just list links. Show 'Leave Balance', 'Next Holiday', and 'Latest Payslip' as visual cards.
4. PROFILE: Use a clean Tab system (Shadcn Tabs) for the Profile section (Personal, Salary, Bank, Docs).
5. PAYSLIPS: Design the payslip list like a wallet transaction history - clean, minimal, with a clear download button.
6. LOGIN: Make the login screen visually stunning using the provided 'login_background' image with a dark overlay and a centered white card.
7. USE EXISTING VARIABLES: Map Tailwind classes to the existing CSS variables where possible, or override them with the new palette defined here.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Create depth through layered design elements.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
